name: ClientContract
description: Implementation of the 'ClientContract' model. A client contract.

PayerClientId.description: The ID of the client who holds the contract.

AgreementDate.description: The date on which the contract was signed.

AutopayStatus.description: The status of the client’s autopay.

AutoRenewing.description: Determines if the contract is auto-renewing.

FirstAutoPay.description: The amount of the first autopay transaction.

LastAutoPay.description: The amount of the last autopay transaction.

NormalAutoPay.description: The amount of the normal recurring autopay transaction.

IsMonthToMonth.description: Indicates if the contract renews on a month-to-month basis.

AutoRenewClientContractID.description: The ID of the contract that this one auto-renews from.

ContractText.description: The full text of the contract.

ContractAutoRenewed.description: Indicates whether the contract was auto-renewed from a previous one.

EndDate.description: The date that the contract expires.

Id.description: The unique ID of the sale of the contract. Each time a contract is sold, this ID increases sequentially.

OriginationLocationId.description: The ID of the location where the contract was issued.

StartDate.description: The date that the contract became active.

SiteId.description: The ID of the site where the contract was issued.

UpcomingAutopayEvents.description: Contains details of the autopay events.

TerminationDate.description: The date that the contract was terminated.

MinimumCommitmentEndDate.description: The earliest date a contract termination can take effect if a minimum commitment applies. This represents the last day the client is obligated to remain on the contract. Returned even if the commitment has already been fulfilled.
